Note: PT says that it is challenging to read the subtitles and take in the information from the video. They are focused on the subtitles being correct that it is distracting from the video itself.
PT states the text size is a good size, not too large or too small. PT states that it is not transcribing all the correct words — for example the video said “wait” but it transcribed as “weight”.
Sometimes the transcript will only transcribe part of the word — like 3 letters of the word rather than the whole thing.

Asked the participant if the transcription was still working well even with the background noise and voices. They said that the background noise has not been an issue. It is transcribing well. We then tested it. We had the pt watch the video and transcription while moderators asked the pt a question. The pt stated the transcription picked up a couple of words from the moderator but definitely not all of them, the transcription stayed with the video more.
PT said that when they hold the phone closer to them, the transcription does not always work. When they hold it farther away, it does work…
